summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Alif Amin Academy authentication and role-based access flows. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend flows for admin dashboard, student dashboard, onboarding, and role-based access control are working correctly.

issues: Chart data is MOCKED (static mock data for User Growth, Revenue Trend, Attendance Rate charts)

critical_code_review_comments: Admin Dashboard charts use static mock data (userGrowthData, revenueData, attendanceData) - this is expected as noted in the review request
ESLint warnings for missing useEffect dependencies in several components (BookingCalendar, FinancialReports, SupportTickets, UserManagement, BookClass) - minor issue, not blocking
seed_data_creation: Created test sessions for admin (muhdsuhaib@gmail.com) and student (test.student@example.com) users in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: All authentication flows are working correctly. Admin users (muhdsuhaib@gmail.com, hello.alifamin@gmail.com) have role='admin' in database and are correctly redirected to /admin/dashboard. Students are redirected to /student/dashboard. Onboarding completion redirects to student dashboard. Role-based access control prevents students from accessing admin routes. Test sessions created in MongoDB can be reused for future testing.

backend_tests: /api/auth/me with admin token returns admin user data - PASSED
/api/auth/me with student token returns student user data - PASSED
/api/admin/stats with admin token returns stats - PASSED
/api/admin/users with admin token returns users list - PASSED
/api/students/dashboard with student token returns dashboard data - PASSED

Admin dashboard accessible with admin session cookie - PASSED
Student dashboard accessible with student session cookie - PASSED
Onboarding page loads with user type options - PASSED
Onboarding completion redirects to student dashboard - PASSED
